# Playbook Manifest

Machine-readable index of every playbook page. Source of truth = each page's YAML frontmatter; regenerate with `python3 scripts/build_manifest.py`.

- **tier** ‚Äî `baseline` (most repos should adopt) vs `optional` (context-specific pattern).
- **targets** ‚Äî files/dirs in a consumer repo this page governs (what to compare / where to apply).
- **detect** ‚Äî path globs, plus `content:<re>` regexes matched against YAML bodies; if any matches the page is relevant (‚Äî = always relevant for its scope/platform).
- **platform** ‚Äî restricts relevance to `github` or `gitlab` (any = no restriction).

## universal

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `agent-instructions` | baseline | Agent-agnostic AGENTS.md as the source of truth, with CLAUDE.md symlinked to it | `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md` | `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md` | any | [universal/agent-instructions.md](universal/agent-instructions.md) |
| `ci-github` | baseline | Single-project GitHub Actions CI: lint + typecheck + test on every PR | `.github/workflows/ci.yml` | ‚Äî | `github` | [universal/ci-github.md](universal/ci-github.md) |
| `ci-gitlab` | baseline | Single-project GitLab CI: lint + typecheck + test pipeline skeleton | `.gitlab-ci.yml` | ‚Äî | `gitlab` | [universal/ci-gitlab.md](universal/ci-gitlab.md) |
| `claude-review` | baseline | Claude Code reviews every PR via claude-code-action + the code-review plugin | `.github/workflows/claude-code-review.yml` | ‚Äî | `github` | [universal/claude-review.md](universal/claude-review.md) |
| `codeowners` | baseline | Required reviewers auto-assigned per path | `.github/CODEOWNERS`, `.gitlab/CODEOWNERS` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/codeowners.md](universal/codeowners.md) |
| `contributing` | baseline | CONTRIBUTING.md: branching, commits, MR/PR + review flow | `CONTRIBUTING.md` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/contributing.md](universal/contributing.md) |
| `conventional-commits` | baseline | Commit message format feeding release tooling | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | any | [universal/conventional-commits.md](universal/conventional-commits.md) |
| `dependabot` | baseline | GitHub-native dependency update PRs | `.github/dependabot.yml` | ‚Äî | `github` | [universal/dependabot.md](universal/dependabot.md) |
| `docs-gen` | optional | Generate README/CLAUDE/AGENTS from partials via a small Python script | `docs/src/`, `scripts/build_docs.py` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/docs-gen.md](universal/docs-gen.md) |
| `git-ai-instructions` | baseline | Repo-local commit/PR guidance for git-ai, framed by user POV | `.git-ai-instructions` | `.git-ai-instructions` | any | [universal/git-ai-instructions.md](universal/git-ai-instructions.md) |
| `gitlab-pipeline-dedup` | baseline | GitLab pipeline economy ‚Äî workflow:rules dedup (one pipeline per change) + auto-cancel of superseded runs | `.gitlab-ci.yml` | `.gitlab-ci.yml` | `gitlab` | [universal/gitlab-pipeline-dedup.md](universal/gitlab-pipeline-dedup.md) |
| `lefthook` | baseline | Git hooks with autofix + restage (stage_fixed) | `lefthook.yml` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/lefthook.md](universal/lefthook.md) |
| `line-limit` | optional | Per-file line cap as a deliberate sprawl proxy ‚Äî CI-gated script, optional local hook | `scripts/check-line-limit.sh` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/line-limit.md](universal/line-limit.md) |
| `mise` | optional | Pinned per-project tool versions ‚Äî best for node/polyglot; uv covers pure-python | `mise.toml` | `package.json`, `go.mod`, `**/*.go` | any | [universal/mise.md](universal/mise.md) |
| `releases-github` | baseline | release-please: PR-driven versioning + changelog on GitHub | `release-please-config.json`, `.release-please-manifest.json`, `.github/workflows/release-please.yml` | ‚Äî | `github` | [universal/releases-github.md](universal/releases-github.md) |
| `releases-gitlab` | baseline | semantic-release: tag + changelog on GitLab | `.releaserc.json`, `.gitlab-ci.yml` | ‚Äî | `gitlab` | [universal/releases-gitlab.md](universal/releases-gitlab.md) |
| `renovate` | baseline | Platform-agnostic dependency update bot (required on GitLab) | `renovate.json` | ‚Äî | any | [universal/renovate.md](universal/renovate.md) |
| `security` | baseline | semgrep (SAST) + trivy fs/image, SARIF to GitHub Code Scanning | `.github/workflows/security.yml` | ‚Äî | `github` | [universal/security.md](universal/security.md) |

## python

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mypy` | baseline | Static type checker, strict mode | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/mypy.md](python/mypy.md) |
| `pydantic` | baseline | Data validation + settings via pydantic v2 / pydantic-settings | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/pydantic.md](python/pydantic.md) |
| `pytest` | baseline | pytest + pytest-cov config and coverage gating | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/pytest.md](python/pytest.md) |
| `releases-python` | baseline | python-semantic-release: tag + changelog for Python repos on GitLab (no node) | `pyproject.toml`, `.gitlab-ci.yml` | `pyproject.toml`, `**/*.py` | `gitlab` | [python/releases-python.md](python/releases-python.md) |
| `ruff` | baseline | Lint + format (replaces flake8 + isort + black + bandit-partial) | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/ruff.md](python/ruff.md) |
| `uv` | baseline | Fast Python package manager + venv + lockfile | `pyproject.toml`, `uv.lock` | `pyproject.toml`, `**/*.py` | any | [python/uv.md](python/uv.md) |

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ci-paths` | baseline | Path-filtered per-subproject CI workflows | `.github/workflows/` | ‚Äî | `github` | [monorepo/ci-paths.md](monorepo/ci-paths.md) |
